nasb.text: Then the king commanded all the people saying, “Celebrate the Passover to the Lord your God as it is written in this book of the covenant.”

esv.text: And the king commanded all the people, “Keep the Passover to the Lord your God, as it is written in this Book of the Covenant.”

cnv.text: 王又命令眾民說：“照著這約書上所寫的，守逾越節，記念耶和華你們的　神。”

ccb.text: 约西亚王吩咐民众：“你们应当依照约书的记载庆祝逾越节，以尊崇你们的上帝耶和华。”
